Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: One of the best trips on the planet is fishing for Peacock Bass in the Amazon River "aka The Rio Negro." Fishing on the Blackwater Explorer with Acute Angling is a real bucket list trip. Shea McIntee and the crew spend a full day fishing for some of the hardest fighting bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Fishing For Monster Amazon Peacock Bass, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode, we venture out onto Porcupine Lake for some beautiful walleye action with Craig Salmonson from Timmins Angling Adventures. Patience was key as we waited for a break in challenging weather conditions—but it all paid off with an unforgettable day on the water. Tune in for expert tips, stunning scenery, and the thrill of fishing in Northern Ontario!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Weathering the Storm: Walleye on Porcupine Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: More of Lake Huron Walleye Fishing
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | More Lake Huron Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Missouri Smackdown
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Pitching and flipping are effective methods to catch Bass in shallow waters, undercover trees, and grass. Shea heads out solo skiff fishing for Bass in Lake Perris. He explains his techniques and tests out a topwater frog lure at dusk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Flipping and Pitching Lake Perris, CA, Part One
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Host, Kim Stricker provides some underwaer insight while experiencing a substancial mayfly hatch in Indian River, MI. Mullett Lake is well-known for big smallmouth and the emerging bugs triggered feeding activity on the water's surface.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Indian River Hex Hatch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In central Florida, Shaw fishes the Naked Rage Blade in heavy weeks for largemouths.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Naked in the Weeds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on Larry smith outdoors we work with the DNR to get a read on how many flathead are in the system. Some of these monsters already have tags and have been swimming for a couple years now. Come with us as we learn the process about how the DNR tracks the movement patterns and spawning locations for these flathead
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Netting Flathead with the DNR
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Wilderness Smallmouth Part 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Retired Colonel Paul Wharton shares his memories of leading his soldiers while teaching his own children the philosophy of “ mission, men and me."
Video.grandparentTitle: Paul Wharton
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro Vs Pro Father and Children Challenge
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Pro - Father and Children Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and Dan Lindner shed light on Aquatic Invasive Species, the status of walleye fishing today, and reaction bait tactics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling - Walleye Today
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Toads on Top
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Toads on Top
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry gives us the inside scoop on tactics and techniques for catching walleye in big water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Slow Death Walleyes

Video.summary: This past summer (2019), we met a new friend Jason, the CEO of the Catalina Island medical center in the city of Avalon. Jason mentioned that he was in charge of a campaign for the Catalina Island Medical Center Foundation. This campaign aims to raise money to build Catalina Island, a much-needed, state-of-the-art medical center. Jason asked us if we could be one of the big-ticket auction items from the list. We would provide a three-night stay on the stoked on a fishing yacht, two days of fishing on our Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot everglades, and provide fantastic food and drinks when we arrived back in Avalon. We love Catalina, and the idea of creating a hospital for the future of the Island was a no-brainer. We couldn't let this great opportunity go to waste and had epic two days of fishing in San Clemente Island with some new friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked On Fishing
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip
Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip
Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass fishing in late summer can be tough, watch as Dusing shows ways to overcome the tough conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Late Summer Bass Smash
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building Bladed Jigs
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains where to find bass under bluebird skies
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Bluebird Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with Dustin Wilks, host of Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks on Wired2Fish TV.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Dustin Wilks
Video.title: Episode 1
